claim_boundary: This matrix is not live Qamus, not arbitrary-text, and not a trained dependency parser evaluation.

layers.minimum_gate: source ledger exists, freshness fields exist, external-source policy is source-clean
source row to public projection to reverse trace to rendered fixture is validated
known ANDON morphology families pass smoke analysis/generation
rule-ranked candidates exist with abstention/blocked status for unsafe rows
governor/i'rab facts are represented as candidates, not broad parser claims
all visible qwords on smoke cards are accountably represented
claim validator rejects broad NLP-stack wording until evidence exists
